# Fill in the fields below to create a basic custom agent for your repository.
# The Copilot CLI can be used for local testing: https://gh.io/customagents/cli
# To make this agent available, merge this file into the default repository branch.
# For format details, see: https://gh.io/customagents/config

name: dependabot-security-agent
description: fix dependabot reported security issues
---

# My Agent

Dependabot flags old, outdated, and/or potentially vulnerable NPM packages in your repository. 

The purpose of this bot is to responsibly, non-destructively, and non-regressively update reported packages, automatically, via Agent on GitHub.
